name: GST Refund Application
description: Application for claiming GST refund under various categories
body: We, {applicant_name} (GSTIN: {gstin}), hereby submit this application for claiming refund of GST amounting to Rs. {refund_amount} for the tax period {tax_period}.
5. Bank account details for refund credit]
We request your good office to process this refund application and credit the eligible amount to our registered bank account.

name: GST Registration Application
description: Application for new GST registration
body: I hereby declare that the information provided is true and correct.

name: GST Notice Reply Template
description: Reply to GST department show cause notice or demand notice

fields.label: Key Points for Reply
fields.placeholder: List main points you want to address in the reply

body: We, {taxpayer_name} (GSTIN: {gstin}), hereby submit our reply to the {notice_type} bearing reference number {notice_number} dated {notice_date}.
2. Relevant legal provisions and case laws
4. Request for personal hearing if applicable]
In view of the above submissions, we request your good office to:
1. Accept our reply and drop the proceedings
2. Grant us a personal hearing to present our case
3. Allow us to submit additional documents if required
We trust that justice will be done and the matter will be decided in our favor.

name: GST Registration Cancellation
description: Application to cancel GST registration
body: Subject: Application for Cancellation of GST Registration
We, {business_name} (GSTIN: {gstin}), hereby request cancellation of our GST registration.
[AI will expand with details about final returns, stock declaration, etc.]

name: ITC Rectification Application
description: Application to rectify Input Tax Credit errors
body: Subject: Application for Rectification of ITC
We, {taxpayer_name}, request rectification of ITC for {tax_period}.
[AI will expand with corrected values, justification, and supporting documents]

name: GST Composition Scheme Application
description: Application to opt for composition scheme under GST
body: Application for Composition Scheme under Section 10 of CGST Act
[AI expands with eligibility and compliance details]

name: E-Way Bill Cancellation Request
description: Request to cancel e-way bill

name: GST Registration Revocation Application
description: Application to revoke cancellation of GST registration
body: Application for Revocation of GST Registration Cancellation

name: GST Payment Challan Discrepancy Letter
description: Letter for resolving payment challan discrepancies

name: GST Advance Ruling Application
description: Application for advance ruling on GST matters

name: GST Nil Return Covering Letter
description: Covering letter for nil GST return filing

name: ISD Registration Application
description: Application for Input Service Distributor registration

name: TDS Return Filing Letter
description: Covering letter for TDS return filing (Form 24Q, 26Q, 27Q)
body: Subject: Filing of {form_type} for {quarter} of FY {financial_year}
We, {company_name} (TAN: {tan}), hereby submit the {form_type} for the quarter {quarter} of the Financial Year {financial_year}.
The return has been filed electronically and the acknowledgment is enclosed herewith.
All taxes deducted have been deposited within the prescribed time limits and Form 16/16A have been issued to all deductees.
Kindly process the return and update the TDS credit in the respective deductees' Form 26AS.

name: Income Tax Appeal to CIT(A)
description: Appeal to Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) against assessment order
body: APPEAL UNDER SECTION 246A OF THE INCOME TAX ACT, 1961
The appellant prays that this Hon'ble office may be pleased to:
1. Set aside the impugned assessment order
3. Grant any other relief deemed fit

name: Rectification u/s 154
description: Application for rectification of mistakes in income tax order
body: Subject: Application for Rectification u/s 154 of Income Tax Act
I/We, {taxpayer_name}, submit this application for rectification of the following apparent mistake in the assessment order:
[AI will expand with detailed explanation and correction requested]
We request rectification of the above mistake and issue a revised order.

name: ITR-1 Filing Acknowledgement Letter
description: Covering letter for ITR-1 (Sahaj) filing
body: [AI expands with filing details and refund/demand status]

description: ITR-4 (Sugam) for presumptive income scheme

description: Letter for advance tax payment calculation and deposit

description: Form 15G for no TDS deduction on interest income

description: Application for NIL TDS certificate

description: Tax audit report for entities subject to audit u/s 44AB

name: Board Resolution - Director Appointment
description: Board resolution for appointment of director
body: BOARD RESOLUTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF DIRECTOR

RESOLVED THAT pursuant to the provisions of Section 152, 161, 168 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Articles of Association of the Company, consent of the Board be and is hereby accorded to appoint:
As a Director of the Company with effect from {appointment_date}.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the above appointment be placed before the members for their approval in the next General Meeting.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT necessary Form DIR-12 be filed with the Registrar of Companies within prescribed time limits.

name: ROC Annual Return (MGT-7) Filing Letter
description: Covering letter for filing annual return Form MGT-7
body: Subject: Filing of Annual Return in Form MGT-7 for FY {financial_year}
We, {company_name} (CIN: {cin}), hereby submit the Annual Return in Form MGT-7 for the Financial Year {financial_year}.
The Annual Return has been duly certified by a practicing Company Secretary and is being filed within the prescribed time limit.
All applicable fees have been paid through the MCA portal.
Kindly register the same and provide acknowledgment.

name: Share Transfer Form (SH-4)
description: Share transfer intimation to ROC in Form SH-4
body: NOTICE TO REGISTRAR OF COMPANIES FOR TRANSFER OF SHARES
We hereby inform that the following share transfer has been registered:
[AI will expand with complete Form SH-4 details]

name: Board Resolution - Bank Account Opening
description: Board resolution for opening company bank account
body: RESOLVED THAT a {account_type} be opened with {bank_name}, {branch_name} in the name of the Company.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the following persons be and are hereby authorized to operate the said bank account on behalf of the Company:
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT all cheques, drafts, and other banking instruments shall be signed by any TWO of the above authorized signatories jointly.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the authorized signatories be empowered to execute all necessary forms, documents, and agreements with the bank.

name: Annual General Meeting (AGM) Notice
description: Notice for convening Annual General Meeting

fields.label: AGM Venue/Platform
fields.placeholder: Registered Office or Video Conference details

fields.label: Agenda Items
fields.placeholder:
1. Adoption of Financial Statements
2. Declaration of Dividend
3. Appointment of Auditor

body: NOTICE is hereby given that the Annual General Meeting of the Members of {company_name} will be held on {agm_date} at {agm_time} at:
1. A member entitled to attend and vote is entitled to appoint a proxy.
2. The Register of Members will remain closed from [DATE] to {agm_date}.
[AI expands with detailed agenda, proxy form, and statutory disclosures]

name: Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) Notice
description: Notice for convening Extraordinary General Meeting

fields.label: Special Business/Purpose
fields.placeholder: Change of name, Increase in capital, Related party transactions, etc.

body: NOTICE is hereby given that an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Members of {company_name} will be held on {egm_date} at {egm_time} at:
To consider and, if thought fit, to pass the following resolution(s):
1. Explanatory Statement pursuant to Section 102 of the Companies Act, 2013 is annexed.
2. A member entitled to attend and vote may appoint a proxy.
3. Proxy forms must be deposited at the Registered Office 48 hours before the meeting.
[AI expands with explanatory statement, voting details, and special resolution format]

name: Board Resolution - Dividend Declaration
description: Board resolution for declaring dividend
body: BOARD RESOLUTION FOR DECLARATION OF DIVIDEND

RESOLVED THAT based on the financial performance of the Company for the Financial Year {financial_year} and subject to approval of members at the Annual General Meeting, a dividend at the rate of {dividend_rate}% per equity share be and is hereby recommended.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the dividend shall be paid to all shareholders whose names appear in the Register of Members on the Record Date.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the dividend be subject to deduction of tax at source as per applicable provisions of the Income Tax Act, 1961.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the above recommendation be placed before the members for their approval at the ensuing Annual General Meeting.
[AI expands with statutory compliances and TDS provisions]

name: Board Resolution - Share Allotment
description: Board resolution for allotment of shares

fields.label: Allottee Details
fields.placeholder: Name, PAN, Number of Shares, Amount

body: BOARD RESOLUTION FOR ALLOTMENT OF SHARES

RESOLVED THAT pursuant to the provisions of Section 39, 42, 62 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Articles of Association of the Company, consent of the Board be and is hereby accorded to allot the following {share_type}:
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the shares shall be subject to the Memorandum and Articles of Association of the Company and shall rank pari passu with the existing shares.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT Form PAS-3 be filed with the Registrar of Companies within 30 days of allotment.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT Share Certificates be issued to the allottees within the prescribed time limit.
[AI expands with consideration received, payment terms, and ROC filing requirements]

name: Board Resolution - Loan Approval
description: Board resolution for borrowing/taking loan

fields.label: Security/Collateral Offered
fields.placeholder: Mortgage of property, Hypothecation of assets, Personal guarantee, etc.

body: RESOLVED THAT pursuant to the provisions of Section 179, 180 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Articles of Association, consent of the Board be and is hereby accorded to borrow a sum not exceeding Rs. {loan_amount} from {lender_name}.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the Directors be and are hereby authorized to execute all necessary loan agreements, deeds, documents, and instruments on behalf of the Company.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the Company may create such charges, mortgages, or hypothecations on the assets of the Company as may be required by the lender.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT Form CHG-1 (for creation of charge) be filed with the Registrar of Companies within 30 days.
[AI expands with Section 180 compliance, limits, and charge creation details]

name: Change of Registered Office (INC-22)
description: Application for change of registered office address

fields.label: Type of Change
options: From one city to another in same state
From one state to another state

body: NOTICE OF SITUATION OR CHANGE OF SITUATION OF REGISTERED OFFICE
We declare that the new premises are owned/held on lease by the Company and are suitable for carrying on the business of the Company.
[AI expands with INC-22 format, regional director approval (if interstate), and statutory requirements]

name: Increase in Authorized Capital (SH-7)
description: Resolution and form for increasing authorized share capital
body: SPECIAL RESOLUTION FOR INCREASE IN AUTHORIZED CAPITAL

RESOLVED THAT pursuant to the provisions of Section 61, 64 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, the Authorized Share Capital of the Company be increased from Rs. {existing_capital} to Rs. {new_capital} by creation of additional shares.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT the Memorandum of Association of the Company be altered by substituting Clause V (Capital Clause) accordingly.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT Form SH-7 along with altered Memorandum be filed with the Registrar of Companies.
FURTHER RESOLVED THAT stamp duty and ROC fees be paid as applicable.
[AI expands with MOA alteration clause, SH-7 format, and stamp duty calculation]

description: Filing of Financial Statements and other documents with ROC
body: - Financial Statements audited by Statutory Auditor

name: Cease and Desist Letter
description: Legal notice to stop infringement or unauthorized activity
body: Subject: Cease and Desist from Unauthorized Activity
This letter serves as formal notice to immediately cease and desist from the following unauthorized activity:
You are required to comply with this notice within {compliance_deadline} days from the date of this letter.
Failure to comply will result in legal action without further notice.

name: Consumer Complaint Notice
description: Legal notice for consumer complaint/deficiency in service
body: Subject: Complaint regarding deficiency in service/product
Please resolve this matter within 15 days, failing which appropriate legal action will be initiated.

name: Payment Demand Notice
description: Legal notice demanding payment of dues
body: LEGAL NOTICE FOR PAYMENT OF DUES
Subject: Demand for Payment of Outstanding Dues
You are hereby required to pay Rs. {amount_due} within {payment_deadline} days, failing which legal proceedings will be initiated.

name: Defamation Notice
description: Legal notice for defamatory statements
body: The above statement is false, defamatory, and has caused serious damage to the reputation of {aggrieved_person}.
[AI will expand with legal provisions under defamation law, evidence of damage, etc.]
Comply within 7 days, failing which civil and criminal proceedings will be initiated.

name: Trademark Infringement Notice
description: Legal notice for trademark infringement
body: You are using our registered trademark without authorization, causing confusion and dilution of our brand.
3. Undertaking not to infringe in future
[AI will expand with Trademarks Act provisions, confusion evidence, etc.]
Comply within 15 days or face legal action under Trademarks Act, 1999.

name: Breach of Contract Notice
description: Legal notice for breach of contractual obligations
body: Subject: Notice for Breach of Contract dated {contract_date}
Your failure to perform contractual obligations has caused significant loss and damage.
[AI will expand with contract clauses breached, damages calculation, remedies under Indian Contract Act]
Remedy the breach within 15 days or face arbitration/civil suit.

name: Employment Termination Notice
description: Legal notice for wrongful termination or employment dispute

fields.label: Grounds for Challenge
fields.placeholder: Wrongful termination, non-payment of dues, violation of labour laws, etc.

body: [AI will expand with relevant labour law provisions, Industrial Disputes Act, service record, etc.]
Resolve this matter within 15 days, failing which complaint will be filed with Labour Commissioner/Industrial Tribunal.

fields.label: Encroachment Details

body: Subject: Notice to Vacate and Remove Encroachment
You are illegally occupying/encroaching upon my property without any right, title, or authority.
[AI will expand with title documents, trespass law, suit for possession, injunction remedies]
Vacate within 7 days or face civil and criminal proceedings for trespass.

a) Decree the suit in favor of the Plaintiff

name: Interim Application (IA)
description: Interim/Interlocutory Application format
body: [AI expands with legal provisions and precedents]
Grant the interim relief as prayed.

name: Caveat Petition (Section 148A CPC)
description: Caveat petition to prevent ex-parte orders
body: The Caveator apprehends that {opposite_party} may file proceedings without notice.
No order be passed without hearing the Caveator.

description: Petition for execution of decree/order
body: Execute the decree and recover the amount.

name: Application for Condonation of Delay
description: Application to condone delay in filing
body: [AI expands with sufficient cause and precedents]
Condone the delay and admit the matter.

body: Grant certified copy of the above documents.

description: Application for rejection of plaint
body: [AI expands with legal grounds - cause of action, jurisdiction, limitation, etc.]

description: Application for temporary/interim injunction
body: APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY INJUNCTION u/O 39 R 1&2 CPC
[AI expands with prima facie case, balance of convenience, irreparable injury]

name: Affidavit of Evidence
description: Affidavit of evidence for plaintiff/defendant
body: I, {deponent_name}, {deponent_status}, do hereby solemnly affirm and state:
1. I am the {deponent_status} in this case and am well acquainted with the facts.
[AI expands with proper affidavit format and verification]
Verified that the contents are true to my knowledge.

name: Criminal Complaint u/s 200 CrPC
description: Private criminal complaint before Magistrate
body: [AI expands with ingredients of offence and evidence]
Take cognizance and issue process against the accused.

name: Bail Application (Regular Bail)
description: Regular bail application in criminal case
body: [AI expands with bail jurisprudence, no flight risk, roots in society, etc.]
Grant regular bail to the applicant.

name: Anticipatory Bail Application (438 CrPC)

body: [AI expands with legal grounds, custodial interrogation not required, etc.]

body: [AI expands with legal grounds and substantial questions of law]

The petitioners have been living separately and mutually consent to dissolve the marriage.
[AI expands with legal format and joint affidavit]
Grant decree of divorce by mutual consent.

name: Maintenance Application (Section 125 CrPC)

body: [AI expands with inability to maintain self, respondent's income, etc.]

[AI expands with legal provisions and reliefs available]

name: Legal Notice for Restitution of Conjugal Rights

body: We were married on {marriage_date}. Without reasonable excuse, you have withdrawn from my society.

In all other respects, the original Will remains valid.

name: Succession Certificate Application

body: [AI expands with list of legal heirs and succession details]

name: FIR Draft (Police Complaint)
description: Draft format for First Information Report to police

fields.label: Detailed Description of Incident
fields.placeholder: Detailed narration of the incident, what happened, witnesses, etc.

body: I, {complainant_name}, residing at {complainant_address}, hereby lodge a complaint regarding the following incident:
[AI expands with cognizable offense details, applicable sections IPC/BNS, witness information]
I request you to kindly register my complaint and take necessary legal action against the accused.
I am ready to cooperate with the investigation and provide any further information as required.

name: Private Criminal Complaint Format
description: Private complaint before Magistrate under Section 200 CrPC

fields.label: Offense Details
fields.placeholder: Detailed facts of the offense committed

body: The Complainant most respectfully submits as under:
1. That the complainant is a law-abiding citizen and is filing this complaint against the accused for offenses punishable under {sections_invoked}.
3. That the acts of the accused constitute offenses punishable under {sections_invoked}.
[AI expands with detailed allegations, evidence, witnesses, and legal grounds]
(b) Summon and try the accused for offenses under {sections_invoked}
(c) Grant any other relief as deemed fit
I, {complainant_name}, verify that the contents of this complaint are true to my knowledge and belief.

name: Compromise Deed (Criminal Matters)
description: Compromise deed for compoundable criminal offenses

fields.label: Settlement/Compromise Terms
fields.placeholder: Amount paid, apology given, conditions agreed, etc.

body: This Deed of Compromise is executed on this [DATE] between:
WHEREAS a criminal case bearing {case_number} is pending in {court_name} against the Accused.
WHEREAS both parties have mutually agreed to settle the dispute on the following terms:
NOW THEREFORE, both parties agree as follows:
1. That the complainant has no objection to the compounding of the offense and withdrawal of the complaint.
2. That the dispute between the parties stands fully and finally settled.
3. That neither party shall make any claims against the other in future regarding this matter.
[AI expands with legal formalities, affidavit format, and court application]
PARTY OF THE FIRST PART          PARTY OF THE SECOND PART

name: Application for Quashing FIR (482 CrPC)
description: Application to High Court for quashing FIR under Section 482 CrPC

fields.label: Grounds for Quashing
fields.placeholder: No cognizable offense, abuse of process, settlement reached, malicious prosecution, etc.

body: The Petitioner most humbly submits as under:
1. That the present petition is filed under Section 482 of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 for quashing of {fir_number} registered at {police_station} under {sections_invoked}.
4. That the FIR does not disclose commission of any cognizable offense.
5. That continuation of criminal proceedings would be an abuse of the process of law.
[AI expands with legal precedents, inherent powers u/s 482, Supreme Court judgments]
This petition is filed within limitation and is supported by an affidavit.

name: Protest Petition
description: Protest petition when police files closure report

fields.label: Grounds for Protest
fields.placeholder: Why closure report is wrong, evidence ignored, inadequate investigation, etc.

body: 1. That a closure report u/s 173(2) CrPC has been filed by the police on {closure_report_date} in the above FIR.
2. That the protestor is aggrieved by the said closure report on the following grounds:
3. That the investigation has been conducted in a perfunctory and casual manner.
4. That there is sufficient evidence to proceed against the accused.
5. That the closure report is contrary to law and evidence on record.
[AI expands with legal provisions, investigation deficiencies, and evidence analysis]
I, {protestor_name}, verify that the contents are true to my knowledge.

name: Victim Compensation Application
description: Application for victim compensation under Section 357A CrPC

fields.label: Details of Crime Suffered
fields.placeholder: Type of crime, injuries, losses suffered

body: APPLICATION FOR VICTIM COMPENSATION u/s 357A CrPC
1. That the applicant is a victim of crime in {fir_case_number}.
4. That the applicant is entitled to compensation from the State Victim Compensation Fund as per the Victim Compensation Scheme.
[AI expands with medical certificates, income proof, State compensation scheme rates]
Grant victim compensation of Rs. {compensation_claimed} to the applicant from the Victim Compensation Fund.
I, {victim_name}, verify that the above statements are true to my knowledge.
